'''zagata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccup|hiccup]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccup|hiccup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zagata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægætæth|zægætæth]] || [[word:zægætæj|zægætæj]] || [[word:zægætæsh|zægætæsh]] || [[word:zægætæ|zægætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagagatath|zagagatath]] || [[word:zagagataj|zagagataj]] || [[word:zagagatash|zagagatash]] || [[word:zagagata|zagagata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagatath|zagatath]] || [[word:zagataj|zagataj]] || [[word:zagatash|zagatash]] || [[word:zagata|zagata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagaftath|zagaftath]] || [[word:zagaftaj|zagaftaj]] || [[word:zagaftash|zagaftash]] || [[word:zagaftaf|zagaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zagatatha|zagatatha]] || [[word:zagataja|zagataja]] || [[word:zagatasha|zagatasha]] || [[word:zagataka|zagataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zagatath|zagatath]] || [[word:zagataj|zagataj]] || [[word:zagatash|zagatash]] || [[word:zagata|zagata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zagatathal|zagatathal]] || [[word:zagatajal|zagatajal]] || [[word:zagatashal|zagatashal]] || [[word:zagatakal|zagatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zagatathatha|zagatathatha]] || [[word:zagatajaja|zagatajaja]] || [[word:zagatashasha|zagatashasha]] || [[word:zagataka|zagataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zagatathan|zagatathan]] || [[word:zagatajan|zagatajan]] || [[word:zagatashan|zagatashan]] || [[word:zagatakan|zagatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zagatathaoro|zagatathaoro]] || [[word:zagatajaoro|zagatajaoro]] || [[word:zagatashaoro|zagatashaoro]] || [[word:zagatakaoro|zagatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
